text:
Eye of Heaven, Gateway of Earth is the 60th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Cards

 
eyecatch60-1.png|Eyecatch #1
eyecatch60-2.png|Eyecatch #2
 

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 98: Greed Without Limits, Chapter 103: For Whom? and Chapter 104: The Center of the World.
The Transmutation Array that appears in the background of this episode's title card is the Reverse Nationwide Transmutation Circle devised by Scar's Brother.
The FUNimation dub changed "The Gate" about 15 episodes into the series to "the Portal," leaving it for the majority of the series, but suddenly in this episode, it's changed back to "Gateway."
In the manga, the scene of Denny Brosh's tearful reunion with Maria Ross took place earlier in the story right after when Fu had joined Greed to fight against Wrath.
